title: SpawnersPlus
description: SpawnersPlus is a lightweight, simple, and powerful plugin that gives you and your players full control over mob spawners. Stop letting those valuable dungeon spawners go to waste!
body:
# SpawnersPlus - Take control of your spawners!

**SpawnersPlus** is a lightweight, simple, and powerful plugin that gives you and your players full control over mob spawners. Stop letting those valuable dungeon spawners go to waste!

Mine them, move them, and even change their mob type with a spawn egg. This plugin is fully configurable, allowing you to tailor it perfectly to your server's economy and gameplay style.

## **Features**
- **Mine Spawners:** Players can mine a spawner and pick it up as an item. The spawner item retains its mob type, so a Zombie Spawner will drop a Zombie Spawner!

- **Change Spawner Type:** Simply right-click a placed spawner with a spawn egg to change the mob it spawns. The egg is consumed in the process.

## **Highly Configurable:**

- **Require Silk Touch:** Set require-silktouch in the config.yml to true or false. You decide if players need the Silk Touch enchantment or just any pickaxe.

- **Mob Blacklist:** Easily prevent players from creating certain spawners (like the Wither or Ender Dragon) by adding them to the egg-blacklist in the config.

## **Multi-Language Support:**

- All in-game messages can be translated!
  The plugin comes with en-US (English) and pt-PT (Portuguese) by default.

- You can create your own language files (e.g., es-ES.yml) in the lang folder and set it in the config.yml.

## **Modern Version Support:** 
- Works flawlessly on Paper/Spigot servers from 1.20.1 up to 1.21.x.

## **How to Use**

1. **Install:** Drop the .jar file into your server's plugins folder and restart the server.

## **Configure (Optional):**

1. A plugins/SpawnersPlus folder will be created.

2. Edit config.yml to set your preferences (like require-silktouch, locale, or the egg-blacklist).

3. Restart or reload the server.

**Mine: Use a pickaxe (with Silk Touch, if enabled in the config) to break a spawner. It will drop as an item.
Change: Right-click a spawner in the world with a spawn egg to change its type.**
